item.title: The More You Know - 56% of an unmuted oodle of interesting faves

Joe Richards https://www.instagram.com/joemyheck/
Dr. Karan Rajan https://www.drkaranrajan.com/about
Peter Donahue https://www.instagram.com/art.pete.repeat/
https://www.instagram.com/treecard
Alanna Kieffer https://www.instagram.com/shifting_tides_nw/
ˢᵒ ᶠᶦᵉʳᶜᵉ --- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag.
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Loaded potato soup.
item.description: Ingredients: 4 slices of bacon, diced. 2 tablespoons unsalted butter. 1 small onion, finely chopped. 2 celery stalks, finely chopped. 2 tablespoons all purpose flour. 4 cups chicken stock. 1 cup whole milk. 1 cup heavy cream. 4 russet potatoes, peeled and diced into 1/2 cubes. 1 teaspoon paprika. 1 teaspoon chicken stock boullion powder. Salt&pepper to taste. EDIT**I made an effort to post the recipe by going through the posters Instagram. This is what they listed. If you don't think it's exact, too bad.**
item.dc:creator: anonymous569076

item.title: Dogs, ducks and cats
item.description: Hope everyone is having a good weekend!
item.dc:creator: Ricobe9

item.title: Proof that VLC is magic and run by wizards
item.description:
Robert Evans, host of the podcast Behind the Bastards.
Source: https://bsky.app/profile/iwriteok.bsky.social/post/3lfg4vvfojc2y Photo source: https://bsky.app/profile/wittywebhandle.bsky.social/post/3lfkonlaam225 VLC works, always has, I don't know how and I never needed to know because I trusted the VLC wizards. I can't think of any other software that has been more reliable than VLC. Also Robert is the man!!! Check out his show behind the bastards. Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes and the award my dudes!! I am so glad to see comments that talk about a time before VLC and the codec nightmares....*shudder* Let's show some support to the real heroes, the VLC WIZARDS! They are open source and nonprofit, doing the Lord's work out there: https://www.videolan.org/contribute.html#money
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Dads being Dads (and grandads)
item.description: To all the Dad's out there who work hard and play harder. It doesn't have to be Father's Day to say thank you for all the love you give.

item.title: Turned My Table Into Antarctica! Recreating Shackleton And The Endurance Legendary Journey!
item.description: I tried to be historically accurate, and inspired by some true events, like the football scene. The crew actually played that game on the ice. I hope you like this series. :)) If you'd like to see more of my works on IG: @ benedek.lampert The story behind the pictures: The Endurance expedition of 1914, led by Sir Ernest Shackleton, aimed to achieve the first crossing of the Antarctic continent. Known as the Imperial Trans-Antarctic Expedition, its goal was to traverse Antarctica from the Weddell Sea to the Ross Sea. However, the mission failed when the ship became trapped in pack ice, and the crew embarked on a heroic struggle for survival. After the Endurance became trapped in ice in January 1915, the crew drifted with the pack ice for months, hoping that natural movement would free the ship. By late October, the pressure of the ice became critical, severely damaging the vessel, which eventually sank on November 21. Shackleton and his crew then camped on the ice, trying to survive until the ice melt allowed them to reach Elephant Island with lifeboats. On August 30, Shackleton rescued all of his men from Elephant Island, concluding one of the most dramatic survival stories in Antarctic history.
item.dc:creator: Lampi95

item.title: Shower Curtain Incident
item.description: The internet loves free stuff, but free for you often means unpaid for creators. Webcomics are the result of hours, sometimes days, of labor. Patreon is what bridges the gap between „free“ and „fair.“ By supporting us, you’re keeping this wild, weird thing alive. Thank you for being part of it. PS: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial
